shop.products.wedding_mini.description: An elegant tiered cake perfect for intimate weddings and engagements. Beautifully decorated with your choice of flowers and accents.

about.title: About Wife Cakes
about.subtitle: The story behind every slice
about.story.title: Baked with Passion
about.story.content: Wife Cakes started as a home kitchen project born from a love of baking. What began with birthday cakes for friends and family grew into a small studio dedicated to creating beautiful, delicious cakes for every celebration. Every cake is made from scratch using premium ingredients — real butter, Belgian chocolate, fresh fruit, and pure vanilla. We believe that a cake should taste as wonderful as it looks.
about.commitment.title: Our Promise
about.commitment.content: Every cake is baked fresh to order. We never use artificial preservatives or pre-made mixes. From the sponge to the frosting, everything is handmade in our studio with the finest ingredients sourced from local suppliers.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a special cake in mind? Want to discuss a custom order? We would love to hear from you.
contact.form.name: Your Name
contact.form.message: Tell us about your dream cake...
contact.labels.getInTouchSubtitle: We accept orders at least 3 days in advance. For custom designs and large orders, please reach out as early as possible.
